original_title: 劇場版 うたの☆プリンスさまっ♪ マジLOVEキングダム
overview: What's better than a concert by one of your favorite singing groups? A concert by three of your favorite singing groups, of course! That's what lucky fans get when three of the most popular vocal groups from the UTANO★PRINCESAMA franchise all come together for a single epic motion picture performance. Have you got your tickets yet? If you have, come join ST★RISH, QUARTET NIGHT, and HE★VENS as they all take to the stage! It's an epic battle of the bands where there's no battle and everyone wins in Utano★Princesama Maji Love Kingdom!
title: Utano Princesama Maji LOVE Kingdom
